translation_logic.batch_limitation: Higher mass intensity and waste generation
translation_logic.flow_advantage: Reduced solvent consumption and waste intensity
translation_logic.what_changed: Manufacturing mode from batch to continuous
translation_logic.safety_improvement: Improved safety profiles mentioned for continuous processes

Comparison of batch vs continuous mass intensity metrics

notes: This is a review paper focused on green chemistry principles in continuous pharmaceutical manufacturing rather than a specific reaction study. Limited specific reaction data available as this is a broad survey of the field with case studies and general principles.
